title: Synchrony Joins Operation HOPE's National 'Financial Literacy for All' Initiative
text: Advances Access to Youth and Adults with Financial Education Partnership Reinforces Synchrony's Commitment to Education as an Equalizer STAMFORD, Conn. , April 27, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Synchrony (NYSE: SYF), a premier consumer financial services company, today announced it has become a member company of Financial Literacy for All (FL4ALL) – a national initiative dedicated to embedding financial literacy into American culture.

title: SYNCHRONY STUDY ESTIMATES THE LIFETIME COST OF HORSE OWNERSHIP RANGES FROM $300,000 TO $924,000
text: Horse Owners Underestimate the Total Cost of Care,  with Actual Expenses Three or Even Four-Plus Times Higher   Research Uncovers 85 Percent of Horse Owners Feel Anxiety from Horse Expenses, Can Expect One to Two Costly Emergency Medical Events Per Year  STAMFORD, Conn. , April 26, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Horse owners nationwide vastly underestimate the lifetime cost of caring for a horse, which ranges from nearly $300,000 to $924,000, according to a new Synchrony (NYSE: SYF) study, "Equine Lifetime of Care.

title: Synchrony Announces Approval of an Incremental $1.0 Billion Share Repurchase Program and Plans to Increase Quarterly Common Stock Dividend by 9% to $0.25 Per Share
text: STAMFORD, Conn. , April 25, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Synchrony Financial (NYSE: SYF) announced that its Board of Directors has approved an incremental share repurchase program of up to $1.0 billion, commencing this quarter through June 30, 2024, and intends to increase the quarterly cash dividend from $0.23 to $0.25 per share of common stock, commencing in the third quarter of 2023.

title: Synchrony Announces Quarterly Common Stock Dividend of $0.23 Per Share
text: Company also declares preferred stock dividend STAMFORD, Conn. , April 20, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Synchrony Financial (NYSE: SYF) announced today that its Board of Directors declared a quarterly cash dividend of $0.23 per share of common stock, payable on May 12, 2023 to holders of record at the close of business on May 2, 2023.

title: LG Air Conditioning Technologies and Synchrony to Partner on Multi-Year Financing Program
text: New Program Will Offer Homeowners Cost-Saving Promotions STAMFORD, Conn. and ALPHARETTA, Ga.

title: Synchrony Leaders Celebrate Grand Opening of Cincinnati-West Chester Hub
text: Company's New Cincinnati-Area Center Supports Today's Hybrid Workforce, Grows Local Economy WEST CHESTER, Ohio , April 20, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Synchrony leaders recently celebrated the official opening of the company's new Cincinnati-West Chester hub. Synchrony's Chief Technology and Operating Officer Carol Juel, Home & Auto CEO Curtis Howse, Chief Human Resources Officer DJ Casto and West Chester Hub Leader Loretta Chandler hosted a ribbon-cutting ceremony with local employees to mark the occasion.

title: Synchrony Financial (SYF) Q1 Earnings Miss on Elevated Expenses
text: Synchrony Financial's (SYF) Q1 results hurt by escalating employee costs and lower average active accounts, partly offset by record purchase volume and improved net interest income.

title: Synchrony (SYF) Lags Q1 Earnings Estimates
text: Synchrony (SYF) came out with quarterly earnings of $1.35 per share, missing the Zacks Consensus Estimate of $1.37 per share. This compares to earnings of $1.73 per share a year ago.

title: Synchrony Reports First Quarter 2023 Results
text: STAMFORD, Conn. , April 19, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Synchrony Financial (NYSE: SYF) today announced its first quarter 2023 results for the period ending March 31, 2023.

title: Can Higher Expenses Affect Synchrony's (SYF) Q1 Earnings?
text: Synchrony's (SYF) first-quarter results are likely to reflect higher information processing expenses and lower net interest margins.

title: Study Finds Healthcare Providers Looking to Outsource Revenue Cycle Management Processes
text: CWH Advisors PatientPay™ research reveals staffing shortages and shrinking margins have providers considering third-party financial partners, prioritizing patient payment experience CONCORD, Mass. , April 6, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- A recent study published by management consulting firm CWH Advisors and sponsored by CareCredit, a Synchrony (NYSE:SYF) solution, found healthcare providers are expressing significant interest in outsourcing their revenue cycle management (RCM) processes.

title: Synchrony Named Number 20 Best Company to Work For in the U.S.
text: 92% of Employees Say Synchrony is a Great Place to Work Synchrony's People-First Investments Deliver Flexibility, Well-Being and Equity STAMFORD, Conn. , April 4, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Synchrony (NYSE: SYF) has advanced to number 20 on the 2023 100 Best Companies to Work For® list in the U.S. by Fortune magazine and Great Place to Work®.
